meta.title: T-6 TEXAN II--An Up Close Look at the Air Force's Primary Trainer
meta.description:
We're at Randolph Air Force Base for an in-depth walk around of the T-6 Texan II and in-cockpit flight footage. 

Free Newsletter with occasional patch giveaways: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/newsletter

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

📷  Shot by Josh Hak and edited by Sam Cyphers

HASARD
Current F-35 fighter pilot in the U.S. Air Force Reserve. Previously flew the F-16, including 82 combat missions. In 2016 selected as the Top Instructor Pilot of the Year for Shaw AFB. Mission commander and the only fighter pilot to fly two different types of jets into combat on the same day.

*Approved and adheres to AFI 1-1, USAF Social Media Policy. For questions reach out to 19AF PA. Opinions do not represent the United States Air Force or any other organization*
